description: Jakarta Activation API defines standard Java and Jakarta EE interfaces and classes for typing data, encapsulating access to data, and associating MIME content with command handlers. This API artifact lets applications and libraries compile against activation contracts while a runtime implementation supplies the concrete behavior.

Jakarta Activation API defines Java interfaces and classes for determining data types, encapsulating access to data, and mapping MIME content to command handlers. This API-only artifact is used to compile applications against the JavaBeans Activation Framework contracts without including the full implementation classes.
